title: vicia pisiformis
intro: Vicia pisiformis, also known as pea false trefoil, is a perennial plant in the legume family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Vicia pisiformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Vicia pisiformis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
